controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute a minimum of 60 percent of the total assets (netted off by intangible assets), on an ongoing basis
controls.control_description:
Qualifying assets of
NBFC-MFIs shall constitute a minimum of 60 percent of the total assets (netted off by
intangible assets), on an ongoing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute a minimum of 60 percent of the total assets (netted off by intangible assets), on an ongoing basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure approach the reserve bank with a remediation plan for taking a view in the matter
controls.control_description:
If an NBFC-MFI fails to maintain the qualifying
assets as aforesaid for four consecutive quarters, it shall approach the Reserve Bank
with a remediation plan for taking a view in the matter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approach the reserve bank with a remediation plan for taking a view in the matter

controls.control_objective: To ensure abide by the following guidelines: (1) loans disbursed or managed by the nbfc-mfi in its capacity as channelizing agent for central / state government
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-MFI acting as Channelizing Agent for Schemes operated by Central /
State Government Agencies shall abide by the following guidelines:
(1) Loans disbursed or managed by the NBFC-MFI in its capacity as channelizing
agent for Central / State Government Agencies shall be considered as a separate
business segment.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to abide by the following guidelines: (1) loans disbursed or managed by the nbfc-mfi in its capacity as channelizing agent for central / state government

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included either in the numerator (microfinance loans) or the denominator (total assets) for the purpose of determining compliance with the minimum
controls.control_description:
These loans shall not be included either in the numerator
(microfinance loans) or the denominator (total assets) for the purpose of determining
compliance with the minimum threshold of microfinance loans.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included either in the numerator (microfinance loans) or the denominator (total assets) for the purpose of determining compliance with the minimum

controls.control_objective: To ensure act as channelizing agent for distribution of loans under special schemes of central / state government agencies subject to following conditions:
controls.control_description:
(2) An NBFC-MFI may act as Channelizing Agent for distribution of loans under
special schemes of Central / State Government Agencies subject to following conditions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to act as channelizing agent for distribution of loans under special schemes of central / state government agencies subject to following conditions:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than 15 per cent of its aggregate risk weighted assets of on-balance sheet and of risk adjusted value of off-balance sheet items
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-MFI shall maintain a capital adequacy ratio consisting of Tier 1 and Tier
2 capital which shall not be less than 15 per cent of its aggregate risk weighted assets of
on-balance sheet and of risk adjusted value of off-balance sheet items.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than 15 per cent of its aggregate risk weighted assets of on-balance sheet and of risk adjusted value of off-balance sheet items

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 100 percent of tier 1 capital
controls.control_description:
The total of Tier 2 capital at any point of time, shall not exceed 100 percent of Tier
1 capital.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 100 percent of tier 1 capital

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as provided in the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025 respectively
controls.control_description:
The treatment to on-balance and off-balance sheet assets for capital adequacy
shall be as provided in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies -
Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025 respectively.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as provided in the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025 respectively

controls.control_objective: To ensure also adhere to provisions of the reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025 on t
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-MFI shall also adhere to provisions of the Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025
on treatment of deferred tax assets and deferred tax liabilities for computation of capital.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also adhere to provisions of the reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025 on t

controls.control_objective: To ensure assign risk weight as per the instructions specified in reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - prudential norms on capital adequacy)
controls.control_description:
For loans guaranteed under any existing or future schemes launched by CGTMSE,
CRGFTLIH and NCGTC, an NBFC-MFI shall assign risk weight as per the instructions
specified in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Prudential
Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assign risk weight as per the instructions specified in reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - prudential norms on capital adequacy)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to nbfc-mfis
controls.control_description:
All other provisions contained in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025 excluding
paragraphs 6(1), 6(2) and 17, where not contradictory to the contents of these directions,
shall be applicable to NBFC-MFIs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to nbfc-mfis

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt the following norms for its microfinance loans: b
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-MFI shall adopt the following norms for its microfinance loans:
B.1 Asset Classification Norms
23.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt the following norms for its microfinance loans: b

controls.control_objective: To ensure the asset in respect of which, no default in repayment of principal or payment of interest is perceived and which does not disclose any problem nor ca
controls.control_description:
Standard asset means the asset in respect of which, no default in repayment of
principal or payment of interest is perceived and which does not disclose any problem
nor carry more than normal risk attached to the business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to the asset in respect of which, no default in repayment of principal or payment of interest is perceived and which does not disclose any problem nor ca

controls.control_objective: To ensure an asset for which, interest / principal payment has remained overdue for a period of more than 90 days
controls.control_description:
Non-performing asset means an asset for which, interest / principal payment has
remained overdue for a period of more than 90 days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an asset for which, interest / principal payment has remained overdue for a period of more than 90 days

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than the higher of
controls.control_description:
For non-performing assets related to microfinance loans of NBFC-MFIs,
provisioning norms shall be as below:
(1) The aggregate loan provision to be maintained by NBFC-MFIs at any point of time
shall not be less than the higher of

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided for as per provisioning norms as mentioned in reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - income recognition, asset classific
controls.control_description:
The amount outstanding in excess of the guaranteed
portion shall be provided for as per provisioning norms as mentioned in Reserve Bank of
India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and
Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided for as per provisioning norms as mentioned in reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - income recognition, asset classific

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in accordance with instructions contained in reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - income recognition, asset classification and
controls.control_description:
Standard assets provisioning of microfinance loans of an NBFC-MFI lying in a
particular layer of the scale based regulatory framework shall be in accordance with
instructions contained in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies -
Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025 for the
respective layer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in accordance with instructions contained in reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - income recognition, asset classification and

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to nbfc-mfis
controls.control_description:
All other provisions contained in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions,
2025, where not contradictory to the contents of these directions, shall be applicable to
NBFC-MFIs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to nbfc-mfis

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the provisions of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the provisions of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the provisions of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - classification, valuation and operation of investment portfolio)
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Classification, Valuation and Operation of Investment
Portfolio) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the provisions of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - classification, valuation and operation of investment portfolio)

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the provisions of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - asset liability management) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Asset Liability Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the provisions of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - asset liability management) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the provisions of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - prudential norms on declaration of dividends) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Declaration of Dividends)
Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the provisions of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - prudential norms on declaration of dividends) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the provisions of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - acquisition of shareholding or control) directions, 2025 excludi
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Acquisition of Shareholding or Control) Directions, 2025
excluding paragraphs 6(3) and 6(4).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the provisions of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - acquisition of shareholding or control) directions, 2025 excludi

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the provisions of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the provisions of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to provisions of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - credit risk management) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Credit Risk Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to provisions of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - credit risk management) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to provisions of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - transfer and distribution of credit risk) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to provisions of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - transfer and distribution of credit risk) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to provisions of the reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - concentration risk management) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to provisions of the Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to provisions of the reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - concentration risk management) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to provisions of the reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - managing risks in outsourcing) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to provisions of the Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to provisions of the reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - managing risks in outsourcing) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure make use of the 'guidance note on operational risk management and operational resilience', as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-MFI may make use of the 'Guidance Note on Operational Risk
Management and Operational Resilience', as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make use of the 'guidance note on operational risk management and operational resilience', as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the following directions on credit facilities and various financial services: (1) reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - c
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to the following directions on credit facilities and
various financial services:
(1) Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit Facilities)
Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the following directions on credit facilities and various financial services: (1) reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - c

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure adherence to the following directions: (1) reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - responsible business conduct) directions, 2
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-MFI shall ensure adherence to the following directions:
(1) Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Responsible
Business Conduct) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure adherence to the following directions: (1) reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - responsible business conduct) directions, 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the provisions of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - financial statements: presentation and disclosures) directions
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures)
Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the provisions of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - financial statements: presentation and disclosures) directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the provisions contained in paragraphs 10, 11, 13, 14 and 15 of the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - branch authoris
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to the provisions contained in paragraphs 10, 11, 13,
14 and 15 of the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Branch
Authorisation) Directions, 2025 on opening of branch / representative office abroad and
closure of branches.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the provisions contained in paragraphs 10, 11, 13, 14 and 15 of the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - branch authoris

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the provisions contained in paragraphs 15 to 19 of the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - undertaking of financial ser
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to the provisions contained in paragraphs 15 to 19 of
the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Undertaking of Financial
Services) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the provisions contained in paragraphs 15 to 19 of the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - undertaking of financial ser

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the provisions of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - voluntary amalgamation) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Voluntary Amalgamation) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the provisions of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - voluntary amalgamation) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure become member of at least one self-regulatory organization (sro) for nbfc-mfis which is recognized by the reserve bank and shall also comply with the
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-MFI shall become member of at least one Self-Regulatory Organization
(SRO) for NBFC-MFIs which is recognized by the Reserve Bank and shall also comply
with the Code of Conduct prescribed by the SRO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to become member of at least one self-regulatory organization (sro) for nbfc-mfis which is recognized by the reserve bank and shall also comply with the

controls.control_objective: To ensure have to adhere to the following set of functions and responsibilities which may be modified by the reserve bank from time to time to improve the effic
controls.control_description:
Further, the SRO holding recognition from the Reserve Bank shall have to adhere
to the following set of functions and responsibilities which may be modified by the Reserve
Bank from time to time to improve the efficiency of the sector:
(1) Criteria for Recognition of SRO for NBFC-MFIs
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have to adhere to the following set of functions and responsibilities which may be modified by the reserve bank from time to time to improve the effic

controls.control_objective: To ensure have at least 1/3rd of the nbfc-mfis registered as its members, at the time of recognition
controls.control_description:
(i) The SRO shall have at least 1/3rd of the NBFC-MFIs registered as its members, at
the time of recognition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have at least 1/3rd of the nbfc-mfis registered as its members, at the time of recognition

controls.control_objective: To ensure have adequate capital to be able to discharge its functions without being overly dependent on subscription from members
controls.control_description:
(ii) It shall have adequate capital to be able to discharge its functions without being
overly dependent on subscription from members.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have adequate capital to be able to discharge its functions without being overly dependent on subscription from members

controls.control_objective: To ensure specify criteria for admission of members and the functions it shall discharge, as one of its main objects
controls.control_description:
(iii) The memorandum / bye laws of the SRO shall specify criteria for admission of
members and the functions it shall discharge, as one of its main objects.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specify criteria for admission of members and the functions it shall discharge, as one of its main objects

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide for the manner in which the governing body / board of directors of the sro would function
controls.control_description:
(iv) The memorandum / bye laws of an SRO shall provide for the manner in which the
Governing Body / Board of Directors of the SRO would function.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide for the manner in which the governing body / board of directors of the sro would function

controls.control_objective: To ensure have adequate representation from both large and small nbfc- mfis
controls.control_description:
(v) The Board shall have adequate representation from both large and small NBFC-
MFIs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have adequate representation from both large and small nbfc- mfis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be independent and not associated with member institutions
controls.control_description:
(vi) 1/3rd of the Board of Directors shall be independent and not associated with
member institutions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be independent and not associated with member institutions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered 'fit and proper', by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
(vii) The Board of Directors and individuals comprising the management shall be
considered 'Fit and Proper', by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered 'fit and proper', by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure have adequate internal controls in place
controls.control_description: (viii) It shall have adequate internal controls in place.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have adequate internal controls in place

controls.control_objective: To ensure function in the interest of all the stakeholders and not seen to be only an industry body
controls.control_description:
(ix) The SRO shall function in the interest of all the stakeholders and not seen to be
only an industry body.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to function in the interest of all the stakeholders and not seen to be only an industry body

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame a code of conduct to be followed by its members
controls.control_description: (x) The SRO shall frame a Code of Conduct to be followed by its members.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to frame a code of conduct to be followed by its members

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a grievance redressal mechanism and a dispute resolution mechanism in place, including a specially appointed grievance redressal nodal officer
controls.control_description:
(xi) It shall have a Grievance Redressal Mechanism and a Dispute Resolution
Mechanism in place, including a specially appointed Grievance Redressal Nodal Officer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a grievance redressal mechanism and a dispute resolution mechanism in place, including a specially appointed grievance redressal nodal officer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in a position to exercise surveillance over its members to ensure compliance with the code of conduct and regulatory prescriptions of the reserve b
controls.control_description:
(xii) It shall be in a position to exercise surveillance over its members to ensure
compliance with the Code of Conduct and regulatory prescriptions of the Reserve Bank
through an Enforcement Committee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in a position to exercise surveillance over its members to ensure compliance with the code of conduct and regulatory prescriptions of the reserve b

controls.control_objective: To ensure also have a developmental function of training and awareness programmes for its members, for the self-help groups and conduct research and development
controls.control_description:
(xiii) It shall also have a developmental function of training and awareness programmes
for its members, for the Self-Help Groups and conduct research and development for the
growth of the MFI sector.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also have a developmental function of training and awareness programmes for its members, for the self-help groups and conduct research and development

controls.control_objective: To ensure nominate a compliance officer who shall directly report to the reserve bank and who shall keep the reserve bank regularly posted of all developments i
controls.control_description:
(i) The SRO, once recognized, shall nominate a Compliance Officer who shall directly
report to the Reserve Bank and who shall keep the Reserve Bank regularly posted of all
developments in the sector.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to nominate a compliance officer who shall directly report to the reserve bank and who shall keep the reserve bank regularly posted of all developments i

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit its annual report to the reserve bank
controls.control_description: (ii) The SRO shall submit its Annual Report to the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit its annual report to the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure conduct investigation into areas of concern as pointed out by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
(iii) It shall conduct investigation into areas of concern as pointed out by the Reserve
Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conduct investigation into areas of concern as pointed out by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure inform the reserve bank of the violations of the provisions of the rbi act, 1934, the directions, the circulars or the guidelines issued by the reserv
controls.control_description:
(iv) The SRO shall inform the Reserve Bank of the violations of the provisions of the
RBI Act, 1934, the directions, the circulars or the guidelines issued by the Reserve Bank
from time to time, by any of its members.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to inform the reserve bank of the violations of the provisions of the rbi act, 1934, the directions, the circulars or the guidelines issued by the reserv

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide information, including data, to the reserve bank periodically or as requested for by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
(v) It shall provide information, including data, to the Reserve Bank periodically or as
requested for by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide information, including data, to the reserve bank periodically or as requested for by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure also play a key role in ensuring compliance with the regulatory framework
controls.control_description:
The industry associations / SROs shall also play a key
role in ensuring compliance with the regulatory framework.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to also play a key role in ensuring compliance with the regulatory framework

controls.control_objective: To ensure also ensure that systems, practices and lending policies in nbfc-mfis are aligned to the regulatory framework
controls.control_description:
In addition, banks lending to
NBFC-MFIs shall also ensure that systems, practices and lending policies in NBFC-MFIs
are aligned to the regulatory framework.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to also ensure that systems, practices and lending policies in nbfc-mfis are aligned to the regulatory framework

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - credit facilities) directions, 2025, reserve bank of india (non-banking fina
controls.control_description:
Microfinance loans of all NBFCs including NBFC-MFIs shall be guided by the
Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit Facilities) Directions,
2025, Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Responsible Business
Conduct) Directions, 2025, and Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025, as amended from time
to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - credit facilities) directions, 2025, reserve bank of india (non-banking fina

controls.control_objective: To ensure extend microfinance loans, which in aggregate does not exceed 25 per cent of its total assets
controls.control_description:
An NBFC, which does not qualify as an NBFC-MFI shall extend microfinance
loans, which in aggregate does not exceed 25 per cent of its total assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to extend microfinance loans, which in aggregate does not exceed 25 per cent of its total assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines already repealed
shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to be
governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under
these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect:
controls.control_description:
Further, the repeal
of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially affect:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in
force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in respect
<image>
of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these Directions
given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
